# Resource: proxmox_notifications_endpoint_sendmail

Manages a sendmail notification endpoint.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the sendmail endpoint.

### Optional

- `author` (String) Author of the mail. Defaults to `Proxmox VE`.
- `comment` (String) Comment.
- `disable` (Boolean) Disable this endpoint. Defaults to `false`.
- `from_address` (String) From address for the mail.
- `mailto` (List of String) List of email recipients.
- `mailto_user` (List of String) List of PVE users to send notifications to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of this resource.
